intent_summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Blog sub-hub (04.04.05) as 'Signal Sweep' — continuous URL monitoring for company press/about pages. Bridge module in hubs/blog-content/imo/middle/signal_sweep/ reads from field_monitor.check_log vendor tier and feeds detected content changes into existing blog pipeline via ingest_article(). Seeds 100 URLs from vendor.blog into field_monitor.url_registry. Sample-gated to 100 records. Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed (wp-20260305-field-monitor-phase1-bootstrap-r2). No modifications to existing blog pipeline. DB writes: seed INSERTs to field_monitor.url_registry and field_monitor.field_state. Doc updates to pipeline.md and SCHEMA.md.

source_packet.note: Source packet arrived pre-structured with allowed_paths, flow_contract, payload, and db_targets. Full context passed through to Planner.

middle: signal_sweep/change_bridge.py — bridge reads vendor tier, feeds ingest_article()
egress: field_monitor.check_log — append-only, written by CF Workers

constraints: Do not modify existing blog pipeline (blog_node_spoke.py, ingest_article.py)
Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed first
